---
title: "miRNA Analysis"
---

The final miRNA analysis uses verified CPM values transformed as log2(CPM + 1). IL-4-versus-Vehicle and IL-13-versus-Vehicle were tested using predefined two-sided Welch tests.

Final counts:

- IL-4 versus Vehicle: 19 nominal-discovery miRNAs and 0 FDR-significant miRNAs.
- IL-13 versus Vehicle: 20 nominal-discovery miRNAs and 0 FDR-significant miRNAs.
- Same-direction shared miRNAs: 4 nominal-discovery miRNAs and 0 FDR-significant miRNAs.

miR-140-3p is modestly reduced after both cytokines, nominally significant after IL-4, not nominally significant after IL-13, not FDR significant, and not a threshold-defined discovery feature because it does not meet the 1.5-fold threshold. It is retained as biologically prioritized and experimentally supported.
